Subject:
// FIRM ENQUIRY // ACCT : OMPL OR NOM // PIG IRON, 20,000 +/-10% MOLOO // PARADIP - THAILAND // LAYCAN : 20 - 25 JAN\'26
Good Eve !
KIND ATTN : CHARTERING DESK
//
Pls find below our Cargo. Kindly send us Firm freight with Demurrage Rates latest by 1400 Hrs tomorrow i.e. 26th December 2025:-
ACCT: ORISSA METALIKS PVT LTD OR GUARANTEED NOMINEE
QUANTITY: 20,000 MT +/- 10% MOLOO BF PIG IRON IN BULK
LAYCAN : 20 - 25 JAN 2026
LOAD PORT: PICT, PARADIP, ECI
DISCHARGE PORT: IRPC RAYONG OR MIT MAP TA PHUT OR SRI RACHA HARBOUR, CHONBURI, THAILAND
LOAD RATE: 6000 MTS PWWD SHINC
DISCHARGE RATE: CQD
NIL ADD.COMM + 1.25% BROKERAGE TO OCEAN REAPER MARITIME
//

entities.DISCHARGE_PORT: IRPC RAYONG OR MIT MAP TA PHUT OR SRI RACHA HARBOUR, CHONBURI, THAILAND
